item.title: It’s coming… X3!!!! ❤️❤️❤️ I’ll be there signi...
item.description:
View on Instagram


It’s coming… X3!!!! ❤️❤️❤️ I’ll be there signing and taking photos at my own booth — come meet me January 17th & 18th- AND use code ELLYCX3 for 50% off of your tickets! ✨see you there!✨#x3show @x3.social
